name: opportunities.r2.reconcile
description: Daily at 04:30 UTC: walks clusters/* in the archive bucket and deletes any cluster directory whose cluster_id has no canonical_jobs row. Backstop for the purge sweeper's DeleteRaw partial-failure window and for archive-succeeded-but-DB-failed writes. DISABLED — target handler queries canonical_jobs which is dropped in Phase 6; will be re-enabled in v1.1 once the Parquet-backed retention compactor is implemented.
